summary: Single Team subscriber archive game non-subscribed teams - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is a single team subscriber
AND an archive game doesn't include the subscribed-to-team
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action:
WHEN a user is not subscribed to either team
AND the user selects an archive game tile
steps.result:
THEN the following title text is displayed "Subscription Required"
AND the following description text is displayed "A subscription is needed to watch this game."
AND the following title text is displayed "Full Game Access"
AND an [Upgrade Plan] button is displayed below "Full Game Access"
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page if they select the [Upgrade Plan] button
AND the user is navigated back to the selected game tile after pressing the "back" button on the remote controller
